title: $HFM_BASE_DIR
text: $HFM_BASE_DIR Assignment setting that specifies the location of internal HTML sources required by the IDE. $HFM_BASE_DIR =usysuniface:html CAUTION: Do not edit or remove this setting. If it is missing or specifies the wrong location, the IDE cannot run. Defaults Assignment file: ide.asn Section: SETTINGS] Default value: None Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
